title: 前日譚①　～記念ライブ、準備中！～

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The student council is holding a meeting in preparation for "Winning
Dream Stage," a commemorative concert celebrating development
and progress in the world of Umamusume racing.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: And that's all for the topics we have concerning the upcoming event.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Air Groove. Well then, that concludes our regular
meeting... and it's already dark out.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Man, I'm hungry. That took forever.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Brian! What's with that tone? You'd think a vice president would more
deeply appreciate the significance of this event!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Yes, yes... I understand you've been a bit overworked, Brian. Hm,
we'll have to do something about that...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Howdyyy! Air Groooove! I'll lend you a hand!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Brian is such a stubborn sourpuss! If you asked me to help, I would finish everything in a snap! ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Rudolf, is there anything I can do for the commemorative concert?
Everyone is looking forward to it, so I want to help.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You guys! Heh... Hahaha! Well, the future certainly looks bright!
You've paved us a way forward!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, everyone. With your goodwill and cooperation, I believe
we'll make speedy progress in our preparations!
